query: SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as total, MIN(area) as min_area, MAX(area) as max_area, AVG(area) as avg_area, SUM(CASE WHEN area IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_area FROM listings GROUP BY platform;
